description_long: This house features a modern, multi-volume design with a combination of flat and gable roofs, surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees. The structure is composed of two main sections: a larger front volume with a gabled roof and a rear section with a flat roof and multiple large windows. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with accents of dark trim and glass, and includes a driveway leading to a carport or garage on the right side. The property is enclosed by a low wall and features a mix of paved and green outdoor spaces, including a patio area. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others in grouped vertical strips. The main entryway is accessible via a short flight of steps and is partially sheltered by the overhanging roof.
description: A modern, multi-story house with gable and flat roofs, surrounded by trees and featuring large windows, a driveway, and a landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gabled section, driveway, carport, and entry steps flanked by trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat-roofed rear section, and extensive tree coverage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat-roofed section, large windows, patio area, and dense landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gabled roof, driveway, and a mix of trees and paved surfaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, partially sheltered by an overhanging gable roof, flanked by landscaping and adjacent to a driveway
